summary: V8 audit: sample chunks from every manifest source domain; catalog un-stripped boilerplate patterns into docs/summary/boilerplate-audit.md
description: For each distinct source domain in sources/manifest.toml (sacred-texts.com, gnosis.org, gutenberg.org, ...): sample N chunks per domain from the corpus TOMLs, eyeball for nav headers, page markers, translator credits, 'more complete etext' lines, Gutenberg license fragments, footnote apparatus. Include the confirmed sacred-texts misses: hyphenated 'Sacred-Texts' prefix, header-without-Previous/Next form. Output: docs/summary/boilerplate-audit.md with a per-domain pattern table (pattern, regex candidate, est. chunk count affected, risk of eating real text). Pure-apparatus WHOLE chunks found during sampling get listed and handed to 50438e23, not stripped here.

resolution.note: Audit complete: docs/summary/boilerplate-audit.md. ~290/4,176 chunks residual (prior cleanups removed the 32%-era bulk). 6 strip classes P1-P6 defined with regexes and risk notes; ccel.org clean; 3 whole-chunk candidates + split-word artifacts + golden-verses.034 Hesiod membership handed to 50438e23; PAGE_MARKER confirmed vestigial (0 matches).
